feed.title: AI Security Daily Digest
feed.subtitle: AIセキュリティに関する日次ニュースダイジェスト - 研究・ニュース・政策動向を自動収集・要約

entry.title: Quoting Armin Ronacher
entry.content:
The most frustrating failure mode right now is that people submit issues that are not in their own voice. They contain an observed problem somewhere, but it has been thrown into a clanker and the clan

Source: Simon Willison's Weblog

ai_commentary

entry.title: Ghost CMS SQL injection flaw exploited in large-scale ClickFix campaign
entry.content:
A large-scale campaign is exploiting a critical SQL injection vulnerability (CVE-2026-26980) in Ghost CMS to inject malicious JavaScript code that triggers ClickFix attack flows. [...]

Source: Bleeping Computer

news
